name: ELF-mcp-server
summary: MCP server for ELF600 electromagnetic analysis docs, workflow recipes, Cubit MEG export notes, and 1600 verified public ELF/MAGIC .mai/.meg sample decks with quality, physics, validation matrix, observable-contract, cross-validation, duplicate/reuse, motor-readiness, ELF/radia/MMM hybrid routing, 2D MMM motor quick checks, local simulation handoff, and release-readiness audits.
